name: Your Cashier Is Being Flirted With
description:
You return once again to the quaint convenience store you love to visit. Why do you love to go there? The reason greets you right as you enter. Koei throws you a lazy smile and small wave, until you disappear in the back. But once you return to the front, Koei is already occupied. A customer acts way too friendly with her and doesn't take her rejection well. It is up to you to save her.

(I don't think smth like an NTR or OptionalNTR tag is necessary for this bot. But if you think it is missing, let me know.)

(This is my second to last attempt to make multiple first messages. If this bot doesn't do as well as I hope, I'm dropping them. I honestly can't tell if my bots have been just getting worse or if there's something cursed about the multiple first messages.)

Source

BTW, THE DOGSHIT FILTER IS FINALLY GONE. WE CAN FINALLY CENSOR PICTURES AGAIN. WE ARE SO FUCKING BACK.
creator: Endivick
